name: Dance Invitation
outcome: [AttackerName] blows a kiss at [TargetName], sending a pink heart towards [TargetHimOrHer]. It strikes true, charming [TargetHimOrHer] even further! [AttackerName] spins around and bends over as [AttackerHeOrShe] starts to sway her tempting rear at [TargetName], and [TargetHeOrShe] can't help but rush forward to start fucking [AttackerHimOrHer]!
miss: [AttackerName] blows a kiss at [TargetName], sending a pink heart towards [TargetHimOrHer], but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to avoid the tempting heart, making [AttackerName] pout as [AttackerHeOrShe] continues [AttackerHisOrHer] dance.
